summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stevens Family PWA - all features working perfectly. Tested dashboard, navigation, dark mode, all 9 pages, PWA functionality, mobile responsiveness, and Google integration placeholders.
passed_tests: Dashboard homepage loads with Stevens Family title and tagline
All 9 dashboard tiles visible and clickable (100% success rate)
Dark mode toggle works on desktop and mobile
Bottom navigation works - all 4 tabs navigate correctly
Calendar page loads with Google Calendar placeholder integration
Photos page loads with Google Drive link
Upload page loads with upload instructions
Dinner page loads with meal plan embed placeholder
Closet page loads with clickable Acloset website link
Find Items page loads with Google Sheet embed placeholder
Recipes page loads with recipe information
Activities page loads with activity categories
Finance page loads with budget dashboard embed placeholder
More page shows all navigation items as list
Service Worker properly registered in browser
All tiles clickable on mobile viewport
